notes: Core mechanics work well including shields, mystery ship, wave progression, and alien firing, but the dying mystery ship disappears instantly (no display time), alien sprites are simplistic pixel blocks rather than classic Space Invaders shapes, and the title screen recreates aliens array mid-render which is a minor logic smell.
A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone, but it has notable fidelity and gameplay roughness issues such as title-state side effects, simplistic visuals, and some awkward pacing/feedback.
